name: Lewis Garage Door’s Repair Handyman Co

reviews.text: Lewis Handyman team did an amazing job on my garage. They painted the interior and the exterior  walls, and steel cellar doors. The workmanship was excellent, and the customer service was even better. The color blended well with our main house and I was more than satisfied. I will definitely use them again!

I called Lewis Handyman Co for a bathroom project.  Removing the tub/shower and replacing with a full shower.  I would definitely recommend them to family and friends.  Their communication is awesome and the contractors we had working on the project were great.  My new shower looks fantastic.  Don't hesitate to give Lewis Handyman Co a call.

Lewis was quick to reply to my new doors installation request, friendly and was able to complete the job in just a day. Very happy with results. Just a straight up, 5 star customer service and experience! Thank you Lewis Handyman Co. Would definitely hire them again.

I used Lewis Handyman Co to refresh my home before putting it on the market. Very responsive during the estimate procedure and I got some good proposals for increasing resale value. Levi and his crew were punctual, committed, and did a wonderful job.  I'd recommend them to friends and family.

Levi at Lewis Handyman Company finished our basement including a beautiful fireplace, built-in bookcases, tiled shower. Everything is beautiful. Built a cover over our deck, looks like it was built with the original house. Built a great deck in our back yard. Laid stone to finish our waterfall pool. He built a glassed recess to display some artifacts. We recommend him and Lewis Handyman Company as a whole to anyone that needs handyman work.
